issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases such as quota limits or network failures.
The skill contains verbose explanations that could be trimmed for brevity.

scenarios.name: HA private Postgres 15 with PITR and IAM auth
scenarios.rationale: Baseline omitted --no-assign-ip, set the IAM flag via console, and added IAM users in the UI; treatment used the full create command with --no-assign-ip, --enable-point-in-time-recovery, cloudsql.iam_authentication=on, and gcloud sql users create --type=cloud_iam_service_account.

scenarios.name: Passwordless GKE connection via Auth Proxy sidecar
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used a key Secret and lacked the proxy flags; treatment ran cloud-sql-proxy sidecar with --auto-iam-authn and --private-ip using project:region:instance, bound the KSA via Workload Identity to a GSA with roles/cloudsql.client, and pointed the app at 127.0.0.1:5432.
